name: Airline-Ticketing-Centre-Program-
description: Java-based Airline Ticketing Centre Program featuring Array and OOP (Object-Oriented) implementations. Includes parallel arrays, class-based architecture, automated queuing system (Waiting List), and file I/O for data persistence.

name: BankAccount-Unit-Testing-JUnit
description: Unit testing implementation and report for a Java BankAccount system using JUnit 5 framework.

name: ChatBot
description: LearnBot is a desktop-based interactive learning platform designed to help beginners master fundamental and advanced programming concepts. Built with Python and Tkinter, it provides a structured learning path, real-world analogies, and a built-in assessment system to make coding education engaging and accessible.

name: CineMate
description: A sleek and responsive movie and TV show discovery web application built with HTML, CSS, and JavaScript. Features real-time data integration, dark-themed UI, and a personalized favorites system.

name: CodePulse
description: Automated Software Quality Assurance (SQA) Dashboard built with FastAPI, Next.js, and SonarQube. Automates code scanning, tracks quality/security metrics, and monitors performance endpoints in real-time.

name: Critical-Section-Problem-Solver---Peterson-s-Algorithm
description: "A Java-based implementation demonstrating the Critical Section Problem and its solution using Peterson's Algorithm. Developed for the IT2106 Operating Systems module at CINEC Campus."

name: E-commerce-Website-Search-Automation
description: Automated UI testing project to verify e-commerce product search features using Selenium WebDriver and Maven build tool.

name: Neth-Sawan
description: Neth-Sawan: An AI-driven accessibility platform designed for the hearing impaired, providing real-time speech-to-sign language translation, object recognition, and sound visualization to bridge the communication gap.

name: ShelfLife-AI
description: An AI-powered retail inventory management system that uses OCR technology to eliminate expiry losses, digitize traditional stock tracking, and maximize profits for small-scale retailers.

name: Sky-Drifter
description: Sky Drifter is a high-performance 2D platformer developed using the Phaser 3 game engine. It showcases advanced state management, real-time physics, and a modular architecture. The game features a sleek glassmorphism UI, dynamic level progression, and local high-score tracking, providing a complete arcade experience directly in the browser.

name: student-social-media-analysis
description: Statistical analysis of social media addiction among students, exploring its impact on academic performance and mental health using SPSS.

name: TailWatch
description: Community-Powered Stray Dog Care & Rabies Prevention

name: Ultimate-Guessing-Game-Python
description: "A modular, menu-driven Python application featuring Number Guessing, Wordman-style Word Guessing, and a Code Breaker game."
